title: Addis 518458 Eco Made from 100% Plastic Round Washing Up Bowl, 7.7 Litre, Recycled Light Grey, 34 x 34 x 13cm
features: Made in the UK, using sustainably sourced Old CD cases helping reduce the use of new virgin plastic material production
Ideally suited for round sinks or other cleaning utility uses
Everyday 7. 7 litre capacity / Dimensions w34 x d34 x h13cm (13. 5" x 13. 5" x 5 inches)
Addis - Part of the home since 1780
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. Made From Recycled Plastics Made from recycled household plastics this bowl is part of our eco range and is totally BPA Free. 7.7L Capacity This bowl has a 7.7 litre capacity which is perfect for all of your washing up needs. Raised Feet The round bowl has raised feet to allow water to drain underneath the bowl
